坑爹的系统抓错人，跑路前留下一身神级医术和无敌体质当“分手费”。
本想就此躺平，娶个媳妇安稳度日，谁知随手在山里救下的绝色美女，竟是当朝女帝夜凌曦？
从此，李承渊的悠闲日子到头了。
女帝：“李承渊，朕的九幽寒煞又发作了，今夜来寝宫！”
公主：“坏蛋承渊，本宫肚子又不舒服，快来给我揉揉嘛！”
天下第一美人：“李承渊！我必杀你！……欸？你刚刚那一针，好厉害……”
面对这一切，李承渊摊了摊手：“我只想躺平，你们别过来啊！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d720d4563d8f5bf5aed51670c3970f56","author":"念与屿","author_id":"","book_id":"7580584306968382526","book_name":"救下微服女帝：她赖在我家不走","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3252人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7580685763134620222","read_count":"3252","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"629834"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.2","serial_count":"295","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,穿越,多女主,女帝,无敌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o18e7901277fe3695d2ac9c63840f438f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779256056&x-signature=29IVIb3%2BVoVLGDlAnA5Q1JkheYc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"52866149588","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"12"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321134736F5E319EB93533A2B5183"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"l
